title: loom.lifecycle.retry v1
description: hearth-loom retry-related signals — retry triggered, gate failed, acceptance criteria evidence passed/failed. Captures WHY a task is retrying or being evaluated for completion. Useful for: detecting flaky gates, identifying beads with unstable AC, measuring retry distribution per gate. Source: /hearth-loom/lifecycle.

gate_name.description: Quality gate identifier for gate_failed events (e.g. 'tests', 'lint', 'build'); null for non-gate events

ac_criterion.description: Specific AC line being evaluated for ac_evidence_* events (truncated 200 chars); null otherwise

reason.description: Short failure or trigger reason (truncated 200 chars)

attempt.description: Attempt number for retry_triggered (1-indexed); null for non-retry events
